description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark gray exterior and a simple, rectangular form. The house features a flat, slightly sloped roof and symmetrical window placement on the front and rear facades. The front of the house includes a paved driveway with three parked cars and a sidewalk leading to the main entrance. Surrounding the house are several deciduous trees and shrubs, providing a landscaped urban setting. The property is bordered by a road on one side, and the backyard appears to have a small patio or garden area. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A modern, two-story gray house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a driveway with parked cars, and landscaped trees surrounding it.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house, driveway, and a cluster of trees with the road extending to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, patio area, and a symmetrical arrangement of trees around the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the house, driveway, and visible parked cars, plus trees and road extending to the right.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entrance, three parked cars, sidewalk, and a row of trees along the road.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a paved driveway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
